main_issue: Wash complaints drove 18% returns. Customers reported fabric transparency and dry-clean-only friction.
buyer_decision: Overrode MONITOR to commit — result validated initial caution.
key_learning: Sheer Chanderi needs built-in lining. Value-fashion customers dislike dry-clean-only garments at ₹699-899 price point.

main_issue: None significant. Slight color bleed in first wash — customer education resolved most complaints.
buyer_decision: TRIAL → expanded after Week 2 sell-through data.
key_learning: Block print cotton at ₹399-599 sells well in tier-2/3 markets. Meesho presence is a leading indicator.

main_issue: Limited wear occasions. Strong margins but narrow buyer interest — bridal/wedding only.
buyer_decision: Bought moderate, sold at full price but slower than expected.
key_learning: Occasion-wear has a narrower window than festive-wear. Pre-Diwali launch is better than year-round.

main_issue: Urban adoption stalled due to price sensitivity. Demand concentrated in tier-2 coastal but insufficient volume.
buyer_decision: TRIAL — failed to expand. Geographic mismatch between product and core customer base.
key_learning: Linen at ₹699-999 is aspirational for tier-2 but overpriced for value-fashion core. Test geography before committing.
